free_text: dE-E telescope with semiconductor Si counters
was used. The thickness of E-detector was about 800
mu-m and the thickness of dE-detector was 11 or 40 mu-m
depending on the energy of secondary particles.
Carbon film with the thickness of 0.4 mg/cm2 enriched
SD: Issue to ref. BAS,37 added.
